The company, now the dominant supplier of high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips used in AI systems for customers such as ‌Nvidia and Alphabet's Google, has emerged as one of the biggest beneficiaries of the global AI boom, propelling a more than 340% rally in its shares this year and lifting ‌its market value above both Samsung Electronics and Micron.  Shares of SK Hynix, now the world's most valuable memory chipmaker, traded up 5.7% to bring the company's market capitalisation to 2,082.5 trillion won ($1.35 trillion) as of 0347 GMT, compared with gains of ​0.4% in Samsung Electronics to 2,081.3 trillion won, excluding preferred shares.

items.summary_kr: 스웨덴은 EU 전체 투표가 다가옴에 따라 차량이 속도 제한을 초과할 수 있는 기능을 비활성화하지 않는 한 Tesla의 완전 자율 주행 출시를 차단할 것을 EU에 촉구했습니다. 덴마크는 네덜란드 규제 규칙에 따라 FSD를 잠정적으로 승인하여 유럽에 분열을 일으켰습니다.
